member.office_address: 345 Cannon House Office Building Washington DC 20515-4007

form_analysis.form_instructions_text: Thank you for your interest in submitting a programmatic and/or language request for the FY27 Appropriations bills. As we continue coordinating with the Appropriations Committee, this form will be updated to reflect any applicable deadlines. To avoid missing a deadline, we encourage you to submit your request as soon as possible and to check back frequently for updates. Should you have any questions or concerns in the meantime, please do not hesitate to contact Congressman Fry's office at 202-225-9895.

sections.description: Details about the organization and point of contact submitting this request.

fields.label: Organization
fields.help_text: Full name of the requesting organization.

sections.description: Specify the nature and jurisdiction of the appropriations request.

fields.label: Type of Request
fields.help_text: Indicate if this is for bill language, report language, or a programmatic funding request.
fields.rationale: The reference values explicitly state this is a programmatic funding request for NASA's Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Issue Area/ Subcommittee Jurisdiction
fields.help_text: Select the relevant House Appropriations Subcommittee.
options: Agriculture & Rural Development, Food & Drug Administration
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
Energy & Water Development, and Related Agencies
Labor, Health, & Human Services, and Education
Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies
State, Foreign Operations, and Related Programs
Transportation, Housing, & Urban Development, and Related Agencies
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
fields.rationale: The reference values specify the Subcommittee as Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies.

fields.label: Agency / Department
fields.rationale: The reference value for Agency is NASA.

fields.label: Account
fields.help_text: The specific budget account within the agency.
fields.rationale: The reference value for Account is Science.

fields.label: Program
fields.rationale: The reference value for Program is Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Title of Request
fields.help_text: A brief, descriptive title for the request.
fields.rationale: The request title is based on the program name as provided in the reference values.

fields.label: Program Description / Proposed Language
fields.help_text: Detailed description of the program or the specific language being requested.
fields.draft_value:
* Requesting $9 billion for NASA's Science Mission Directorate (SMD) to fund critical exploration across Earth Science, Planetary Science, Astrophysics, and Heliophysics.
* Supports peer-reviewed Decadal Survey priorities and maintains U.S. leadership in the face of rising international competition in space exploration.
* Provides the necessary funding to restore mission schedules and workforce stability following significant budgetary disruptions in FY 2026.
* Sustains a unique national capability for discovery that drives innovation in aerospace, weather forecasting, and planetary defense.
fields.rationale: This value uses the specific $9 billion ask and programmatic description from the reference values. It incorporates advocacy talking points regarding Decadal Surveys, international competition (China), and the FY 2026 funding restoration.

sections.description: Details regarding the requested funding amount and historical funding levels.

fields.label: Requested Funding Action
fields.help_text: Select the desired funding action for the program.
options: Support the President's FY2027 budget request
fields.rationale: The request is for a specific topline funding amount of $9 billion for the Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: FY27 Funding Request
fields.rationale: The exact funding ask provided in the reference values is $9,000,000,000.

fields.label: FY27 President's budget request amount
fields.help_text: Amount requested by the President for this program in the FY27 budget.
fields.rationale: The reference values state that the FY2027 President's Budget Request is currently unknown as it has not been released.

fields.label: FY26 Enacted level (if not applicable, please put "N/a"
fields.help_text: The amount appropriated for this program in the prior fiscal year (FY26).
fields.rationale: The provided pre-filled value and the reference value for FY2026 enacted level is $7,250,000,000.

sections.description: Contextual information regarding local impact and coordination with other offices.

fields.label: Impact on South Carolina's 7th Congressional District
fields.help_text: Explain how this funding or language will benefit the district.
fields.draft_value:
* NASA Science funding supports a national aerospace supply chain and innovation economy that generates a 3-to-1 return on investment for every dollar spent.
* Sustains the STEM talent pipeline and inspires the next generation of South Carolina students to pursue careers in high-tech manufacturing and engineering.
* Advances critical research in weather forecasting and Earth observation that provides actionable data for coastal management and disaster resilience in South Carolina.
* Strengthens U.S. economic competitiveness by ensuring the domestic aerospace workforce remains the world leader in cutting-edge technology and exploration.
fields.rationale: Since there is no direct spending in SC-7 ($0.00), the response focuses on the broader national economic returns, STEM pipeline benefits, and practical applications like weather forecasting which are relevant to a coastal district like SC-7.

fields.label: Did you submit this request last year?
fields.rationale: Submission history for the user is not provided in the context; requiring user confirmation.

fields.label: If you are submitting more than one request, please rank them to demonstrate your priorities (Ex: 1 of 3)
fields.rationale: This field requires the submitter to specify their own internal ranking of multiple requests, which is not available in the provided context.

fields.label: Are you aware of an E-Dear Colleague Circulating?
fields.rationale: The reference values indicate an existing House letter led by Reps. Don Bacon and Judy Chu.

fields.label: If so, please provide information about the letter, including the lead office.
fields.draft_value: * A House programmatic support letter for NASA Science is led by Reps. Don Bacon (R-NE) and Judy Chu (D-CA).
fields.rationale: This information is explicitly provided in the 'Congressional Support' section of the reference values.

fields.label:
Please Attach Additional Information
     - PDF format
     - Stitch all content into one file
fields.help_text: Upload supporting documentation in a single PDF file.
